zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Bohun於1366年5月8日之前出生在英國艾可時，她的父親Humphrey Bohun24歲，母親Joan FitzAlan18歲。她於1374年8月24日之前與Thomas of Woodstock在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1399年10月3日在英國艾可巴爾金，埋葬在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Bohun于1366年5月8日之前出生在英国艾可时，她的父亲Humphrey Bohun24岁，母亲Joan FitzAlan18岁。她于1374年8月24日之前与Thomas of Woodstock在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1399年10月3日在英国艾可巴爾金，埋葬在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bohan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Connor, John Patrick, Brendan, Liam.
Irish (Leitrim): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhacháin, from a personal name which is a diminutive of buadhach ‘victorious’.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Bohun was born before 8 May 1366, in Essex, England, her father, Humphrey Bohun, was 24 and her mother, Joan FitzAlan, was 18. She married Thomas of Woodstock before 24 August 1374, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 3 October 1399, in Barking, Essex, England, and was buried in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Bohun est née avant 8 mai 1366, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey Bohun, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan FitzAlan, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas of Woodstock avant 24 août 1374, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 octobre 1399, à Barking, Essex, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Eng: Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Bohun vor 8. Mai 1366 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Humphrey Bohun 24 und ihre Mutter Joan FitzAlan 18. Sie hat vor 24. August 1374 in England Thomas of Woodstock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Oktober 1399 in Barking, Essex, England und wurde in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England begraben.

Lei sposato Thomas of Woodstock prima del 24 agosto 1374, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 3 ottobre 1399, nel Barking, Essex, England, e fu sepolta a Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England.

ko.Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Eng: 영국 에세스 사프런 월든 월든 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Bohun(이)가 1366년 5월 8일 이전 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey Bohun(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan FitzAlan(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1374년 8월 24일 이전 영국에서 Thomas of Woodstock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1399년 10월 3일 영국 에세스 바킨그에서 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Eng: Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Bohun nasceu antes 8 de maio de 1366, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey Bohun, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan FitzAlan, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas of Woodstock antes 24 de agosto de 1374, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de outubro de 1399, em Barking, Essex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Eng: валден эбби, саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Bohun родилась перед 8 май 1366 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Humphrey Bohun было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan FitzAlan, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas of Woodstock перед 24 августа 1374 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 3 октября 1399 г. в местности баркинг, эссекс, Англия и была похоронена в местности вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия.
